title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should shift focus from coding alone to understanding fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) and leveraging AI agents for productivity. The video suggests that architectural knowledge and review skills now matter more than writing code, with endorsement from AWS Distinguished Engineer Marc Brooker.
